name: Pineapple Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 4 each Pork loin or rib chops, lean
recipeInstructions:
Note: Choose approximately 1/2 inch thick chops. Cut pineapple into slices, pack in juice, and drain, reserving juice.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Trim fat from chops and lightly sprinkle both sides with salt. Place in an ungreased baking dish.
Mix brown sugar with 2 tablespoons of reserved pineapple juice and nutmeg. Spoon half the mixture over the pork. Top pork with pineapple slices and cover with remaining mixture. Cover and bake for 30 minutes. Then uncover and bake until done (15-20 more minutes), spooning sauce over pork occasionally. Garnish with snipped chives if desired.
